spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.general_idea: Replace field injection with constructor injection to adhere to modern Spring best practices and improve testability.
spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.human_impl: Removed @Autowired from field and added constructor with final fields for repositories.

spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.general_idea: Introduce the new Spring Boot 3.2+ JdbcClient API alongside the existing JdbcTemplate approach.
spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.human_impl: Added import and field for StudentJdbcClientRepository and injected it via constructor.

spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.general_idea: Rename logger field to uppercase constant to follow standard Java naming conventions for static/final fields.
spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.human_impl: Changed 'logger' to 'LOGGER' and updated all usages.

spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.general_idea: Update import to reflect the renaming of the JdbcTemplate-based repository class.
spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.human_impl: Changed import from StudentJdbcRepository to StudentJdbcTemplateRepository.

spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.general_idea: Add demonstration code in CommandLineRunner to showcase the new JdbcClient API functionality.
spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.human_impl: Added LOGGER.info calls and repository method invocations for jdbcClientRepository.

spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.general_idea: Add a method that returns a JSON string representation of the object using Java 15+ text blocks.

spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/m.general_idea: Removed unused SLF4J imports to clean up the codebase.
Removed the unused logger field instance.
Standardized indentation to use spaces instead of tabs.
spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/m.human_impl: Changed indentation of fields and methods from tabs to 4 spaces

spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/m.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Add @Data annotation to generate getters, setters, toString, equals, and hashCode methods automatically.
Add @NoArgsConstructor annotation to generate a no-argument constructor required by JPA.
Remove manually written getter and setter methods as they are now generated by Lombok.
Remove manually written constructors as the no-args constructor is generated by Lombok and other constructors are no longer explicitly defined.
spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/m.human_impl: - public Student(Long id, String name, String passportNumber) { ... }

spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/m.general_idea: Remove manually written toString method as it is now generated by Lombok @Data.
Add @NonNull annotations from org.jspecify to repository type parameters to support null-safety features in newer Spring Data versions.

spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/t.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations and runner with JUnit 5 equivalents to align with modern Spring Boot testing standards.
spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/t.human_impl: Changed imports from org.junit.Test to org.junit.jupiter.api.Test and replaced @RunWith(SpringRunner.class) with @ExtendWith(SpringExtension.class).

spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/t.general_idea: Adjust code indentation to use spaces instead of tabs for consistent formatting.
spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/t.human_impl: Replaced tab characters with spaces in the method body indentation.

spring-boot-2-jpa-with-hibernate-and-h2/.general_idea: Replace field injection with constructor injection to adhere to modern Spring best practices and improve testability.
spring-boot-2-jpa-with-hibernate-and-h2/.human_impl: Removed @Autowired from field and added constructor accepting StudentRepository.

spring-boot-2-jpa-with-hibernate-and-h2/.general_idea: Rename logger instance to uppercase constant to follow Java naming conventions for static/final fields.
Move main method to the end of the class for better code organization.
spring-boot-2-jpa-with-hibernate-and-h2/.human_impl: Moved public static void main method from top to bottom of class.

spring-boot-2-jpa-with-hibernate-and-h2/.general_idea: Add a log statement to print all users after performing CRUD operations.
Update JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
Introduce Lombok annotations to replace boilerplate code for getters, setters, constructors, and toString methods.
Remove explicit getter, setter, and toString method implementations in favor of Lombok-generated equivalents.
spring-boot-2-jpa-with-hibernate-and-h2/.human_impl: Removed public Long getId() { return id; } and similar methods

spring-boot-2-jpa-with-hibernate-and-h2/.general_idea: Replace explicit no-args and all-args constructors with Lombok annotations while retaining a specific convenience constructor.
Add @NonNull annotations from org.jspecify to generic type parameters to support null-safety features in newer Java/Spring versions.
spring-boot-2-jpa-with-hibernate-and-h2/.human_impl: import org.jspecify.annotations.NonNull; ... extends JpaRepository<@NonNull Student, @NonNull Long>

spring-boot-2-myBatis-with-h2/src/main/j.general_idea: Replace field injection with constructor injection to adhere to modern Spring Boot best practices and improve testability.
spring-boot-2-myBatis-with-h2/src/main/j.human_impl: Removed @Autowired from field and added constructor taking StudentMyBatisRepository.

spring-boot-2-myBatis-with-h2/src/main/j.general_idea: Mark injected dependencies and logger as final to ensure immutability and thread safety.
spring-boot-2-myBatis-with-h2/src/main/j.human_impl: Added 'final' keyword to LOGGER and repository fields.

spring-boot-2-myBatis-with-h2/src/main/j.general_idea: Rename logger instance to uppercase constant to follow Java naming conventions for static/final fields.
Remove 'throws Exception' from run method as it is not required by the CommandLineRunner interface and no checked exceptions are thrown.
spring-boot-2-myBatis-with-h2/src/main/j.human_impl: Removed 'throws Exception' from public void run(String... args).

spring-boot-2-myBatis-with-h2/src/main/j.general_idea: Standardize code indentation to use 4 spaces instead of tabs or mixed indentation.
Replace the traditional POJO class with a Java record to leverage modern language features for immutable data carriers.
